final:
module RefModule(input wire clk,
   output reg foo, bar,
   input wire foo_valid, foo_in,
   input wire bar_valid, bar_in
   );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
     begin
	if (foo_valid) foo <= foo_in;
	if (bar_valid) bar <= bar_in;
     end

endmodule
